'''Berethron e Solo''' was a [[King/Legends|King]] of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. During Solo reign, he initiated democratic reforms in the [[Corellian empire]].

==Biography==
In [[312 BBY]], he abolished his absolute rule and moved the planetary government toward a constitutional monarchy.

==Legacy==
[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and his cousin [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]] were both thought to be Berethron's descendants. In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] invoked that lineage to prove Solo's worthiness to marry [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] before the [[Hapan Royal House]]. Han's great-grandfather, [[Korol Solo]], was a presumed descendant of Berethron, and used that to put a forward a claim as pretender to the throne of the Corellian empire, but was hanged for his crimes.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Paradise Snare]]'' {{Mo}}
*''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'' {{Ab|The Courtship of Princess Leia (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
